payload.label: chair
payload.short_description: dark wooden slatted chair side crop
payload.long_description: Side view of a dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair with vertical slatted back and carved top rail; seat and lower stretcher are visible but the chair is partially cropped at the image edge and appears about 1.2 m from the camera.
